name: Olark API
what_it_does: Olark REST API — live chat platform REST API for accessing conversation transcripts, visitor data, and operator information, enabling agents to sync chat data with CRM systems, trigger automations based on chat events, and manage chat widget configuration.
use_cases: Agents pulling Olark chat transcripts after conversations to create CRM tickets and update contact records
Lead routing — agents using Olark webhooks to capture visitor data and route leads to appropriate sales reps in CRM
Support analytics — agents querying Olark conversation data for chat volume, satisfaction scores, and response time metrics
Visitor intelligence — agents correlating Olark visitor data with marketing analytics for lead scoring workflows
CRM sync — agents creating or updating HubSpot/Salesforce contacts from Olark conversation data via API
not_for: Modern omnichannel support — Olark is web chat only; use Freshchat or Intercom for multi-channel messaging
AI chatbot automation — Olark's automation is rule-based; use Intercom or Drift for AI-powered chat automation
Large enterprise deployments — Olark is best for small-to-mid business; Zendesk scales better for enterprise
best_when: You need a simple, reliable live chat widget with accessibility features (ADA compliant) and basic CRM integration for a small business website.
avoid_when: You need AI chatbots, omnichannel messaging (WhatsApp, Facebook), or enterprise support workflows — Olark's feature set is intentionally focused on simple live chat.

auth.notes: API key from Olark account settings. Passed as basic auth or query parameter. Single key with full account access. Webhook payloads include site ID for verification.

pricing.paid_tiers: Olark: $29/seat/month; Pro: custom pricing with advanced features
pricing.notes: Per-seat pricing. 14-day free trial available. No permanent free tier. Simple per-seat pricing is predictable. Annual discount available.

performance.rate_limits: Not prominently documented; conservative estimates ~60 req/min

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Basic REST API with limited documentation. Webhook-first design for real-time events. API primarily for data retrieval (transcripts, visitor data). Limited write operations available via API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: API is primarily read-only — all data retrieval endpoints are idempotent. No write operations that could cause duplication concerns.
known_agent_gotchas: Olark API is primarily read-only — agents cannot initiate chats or send messages via API
Rate limits undocumented — implement conservative request pacing to avoid being blocked
Webhooks are the primary integration pattern for real-time events; REST API is for historical data access
Visitor data is only available for identified visitors — anonymous visitors have limited data in API
Olark's API coverage is narrower than competing platforms — some UI features have no API equivalent

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant with DPA. ADA/WCAG accessibility compliant — unique differentiator. TLS enforced. No SOC2. API key auth with no scope granularity. US data processing.
